name: odoo-connector
description: Connect Claude to your Odoo instance — search, read, create and update records.
long_description:
Exposes your Odoo ERP over its external API as tools Claude can call: list models, search records with domains, read/create/update/delete records, and call arbitrary model methods. Each user configures their own Odoo instance and credentials below — nothing is shared or hardcoded.

After installing, just ask Claude to "test my Odoo connection" (or run the built-in "setup" prompt) — it runs a staged health check and tells you exactly which field to fix if anything is wrong.

tools.name: test_connection
tools.description: Verify configuration and credentials with a staged health check.

tools.name: search_records
tools.description: Search a model and return matching records.

tools.name: read_record
tools.description: Read the fields of a single record by id.

tools.name: create_record
tools.description: Create a new record and return its id.

tools.name: update_record
tools.description: Update fields on an existing record.

tools.name: call_method
tools.description: Call an arbitrary method on a model.

odoo_url.title: Odoo URL
odoo_url.description: Base URL of your Odoo instance, e.g. https://yourco.odoo.com

odoo_db.title: Database name (optional)
odoo_db.description: Leave blank to auto-detect — derived from the *.odoo.com subdomain, or the sole database if the server exposes one. Set it only if auto-detect fails or you run multiple databases.

odoo_username.title: Username / email
odoo_username.description: The login you use for Odoo.

odoo_password.title: API key or password
odoo_password.description: Recommended: an Odoo API key (Settings → Account Security → New API Key).
